summary: Full MCP primitive coverage: Resources, Prompts, Sampling, Elicitation, Logging, and experimental Tasks.
added: Resources — 14 resource URIs across tokens, components, themes, icons, guidelines, and lifecycle
Prompts — 9 MCP prompt primitives replacing the REST /prompt-templates endpoint
Sampling — 5 server-side sampling use cases for fuzzy validation and intent resolution
Elicitation — 6 interactive elicitation scenarios for ambiguity and destructive operations
Logging — 4 log levels, 14 structured log events via notifications/message
Tasks (experimental) — batch_validate and full_audit as long-running task-based tools
deprecated: GET /prompt-templates — replaced by MCP Prompts primitive; endpoint retained for backward compatibility

summary: Tool expansion: themes, icons, accessibility, component depth, layout, and versioning.
added: list_themes — list all available themes
get_theme — get full theme definition with token overrides
list_icons — list all icons, optionally filtered by category or tag
get_icon — get a single icon by name with SVG metadata and usage guidance
search_icons — semantic search across the icon set
check_contrast — WCAG AA/AAA contrast ratio checker
get_accessibility_guidance — per-component ARIA, keyboard, and focus-order spec
get_component_variants — variants with when-to-use guidance
get_component_anatomy — internal slots, valid children, and composition patterns
get_component_relationships — parent, sibling, and related components
get_layout_guidance — page gutters, max-widths, breakpoints, region spacing
get_spacing_scale — structured spacing scale with semantic usage hints
get_changelog — version history filterable by version range
get_deprecations — current deprecations with migration paths and removal timelines
changed: validate_component_usage — now returns actionable fix suggestions alongside violations

summary: Initial release with 13 core tools for tokens, components, validation, and search.
added: list_token_categories
get_tokens
get_token
list_components
get_component
get_component_tokens
validate_color
get_component_constraints
validate_component_usage
suggest_token
diff_against_system
search
get_schema
